title: A Love That Begins with the Ending
overview: Tiararose is shocked when her engagement is broken... but then the prince of another kingdom proposes to her.

title: Prince Aqua, Do You Like Sugar?
overview: As Aquasteed and Tiararose grow closer, Hartknights begins to feel guilty for what he did to Tiararose.

title: A Proposal Sweeter Than Honey
overview: Aquasteed recalls his first encounter with Tiararose and the events leading up to their engagement.

title: The Sweetest Kiss in the World
overview: After Akari uses the Holy Prayer, Tiararose worries that she'll lose yet another fiancé to her.

title: The Mermaid Knows Not of Love
overview: Tiararose finally meets Icilla, the heroine of the sequel to The Ring of Lapis Lazuli.

title: Tiara in the Sleeping Forest
overview: The Forest Fairy King has taken notice of Tiara and it seems he doesn't want to let her go.

title: Hold Me... Tighter
overview: The Forest Fairy King has taken Tiararose to his castle, so she bargains with the fairies to return home.

title: Blessings on the Teary Bride
overview: It's finally time for Tiararose and Aquasteed's wedding... but will Icilla ruin the bride's big day?

title: A Love Like Ripples on the Water
overview: The desserts Tiararose bakes keep disappearing. Could it be the work of fairies?

title: Whisper That You Love Me
overview: Icilla tries to find out why the Sea Fairy King hates Tiararose... and faces a temptation she never expected.

title: My Beautiful Lady
overview: The ocean has turned black with the Sea Fairy King's rage. Can Tiararose and Aquasteed restore it?

title: Love Is Always and Forever
overview: After healing the ocean, can Tiararose finally get on the Sea Fairy King's good side and earn her blessing?
